events.name: Payment Created
events.description: Evento emitido cuando se crea un pago.

consumerUsage.typescript:
const consumer = createConsumer({ payments: { paymentCreated: async (payload, envelope) => { /* handle */ } } });
await consumer.handle(envelope);

backgroundConsumerUsage.python:
runner = run_consumer(
    source=SqsMessageSource(queue_url),
    consumer=consumer,
    concurrency=5,
)
await runner.start()
